name: Shenzhen Liande Automation Equipment co.,ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Liande Automation Equipment co.,ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells industrial automatic equipment in China and intentionally. It offers production supporting equipment and non-standard automation equipment for LCMs, OLEDs, and CTPs. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
